articles.headline: No Bafana, no party! South Africa stun South Korea to advance to FIFA World Cup R32
articles.description: South Africa, against all expectations, pulled off a 1-0 win against South Korea in Monterrey on Wednesday, gathering all three points they needed to advance to the round of 32 at the FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Bafana celeb [1296x729]
images.caption: Unbridled joy for South Africa.
images.credit: YURI CORTEZ / AFP via Getty Images

articles.headline: Guillermo Ochoa cameo seals perfect Mexico group stage
articles.description: Goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa took the field during the 78th minute of Mexico's 3-0 win over Czechia, giving the 40-year-old the chance to appear in his sixth World Cup.

images.name: Ochoa Mexico Czechia_260624 [1296x729]
images.caption: Guillermo Ochoa celebrates Mexico's third goal after coming on as a substitute to play in his fourth World Cup.
images.alt: Guillermo Ochoa celebrates Mexico's third goal after coming on as a substitute to play in his fourth World Cup.

images.name: Mexico fans came ready with umbrellas to celebrate goal vs. Czechia
images.caption: Mexico fans came ready with umbrellas to celebrate goal vs. Czechia

articles.headline: South Africa stun South Korea to reach World Cup knockouts for 1st time
articles.description: South Africa advanced to the knockout phase of the World Cup for the first time with a 1-0 victory over South Korea on Wednesday.

images.name: South Africa celeb vs South Korea [1296x729]
images.caption: South Africa celebrate Thapelo Maseko's goal against South Korea.
images.alt: Thapelo Maseko #12 of South Africa celebrates with teammates after scoring the team's first goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A match between South Africa and Korea Republic at Monterrey Stadium on June 24, 2026 in Guadalupe, Mexico.
images.credit: Julian Finney - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: South Africa look ahead to must-win clash with South Korea
images.caption: South Africa look ahead to must-win clash with South Korea

articles.headline: World Cup Daily live updates: South Africa shock Korea, Mexico smash Czechia
articles.description: We are now down to the final round of group stage matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, where all teams from the same group will be playing at the same time.
